title: About us and our story | The Black Dahlia | Littleport
description: Learn about how we started at The black dahlia and our artists Laura, Sharnia and Caitlin. Your go-to destination for custom and original tattoos in Littleport.
headings: The Black Dahlia private tattoo studio
textBlocks: follow our socials for raffles and discounted designs

At The Black Dahlia, we love creating unique designs with you and turning them into the perfect tattoo. We’re passionate about our craft and enjoy working from a brief to bring your vision to life. Our tattoo studio is welcoming and comfortable for people from all walks of life, and every design is hand-drawn to each client’s request.

We also offer original pre-drawn pieces that you can browse on our artists’ Instagram portfolios. Whether you want a custom commission or a ready-made design adapted to your style, our artists take the time to collaborate and ensure the tattoo fits your vision.
Located in Littleport, we specialise in Blackwork, Realism B&G, Traditional, colour and more! We follow strict hygiene and aftercare practices to keep your experience safe and comfortable.
Book a consultation or view artist portfolios to find the right fit for your next piece.

The studio was opened in 2019 by Laura and Sharnia after working together in the industry for many years, their goal was to build a comfortable, creative appointment only tattoo studio which was an escape for artists and clients. We have a friendly team of artists that are dedicated to their craft and making every tattoo a memorable experience and worth coming back for.
We currently have 3 artists working at the studio and you'll be able to find their portfolio's
on our website with links to their social media accounts where you’ll find their most up to date portfolios.
we offer free consultations online and in person,
please ​don't hesitate ​to get in touch and and a question or talk about ideas.

title: Studio Policies | The Black Dahlia | Littleport
description: Learn more about our studio, booking and refund policies at The Black Dahlia Tattoo Studio, Littleport.
headings: The Black Dahlia private tattoo studio
textBlocks: follow our socials for raffles and discounted designs
This page outlines our studio and booking policies. Please read carefully before booking in and if you have any queries please get in touch via the contact form,
By booking and receiving services at our studio, you and agree to the following terms:
All services are conducted by trained professionals adhering to strict hygiene and safety protocols.
Results may differ based on individual factors such as skin type, health, and compliance with aftercare instructions.
You are responsible informing us of any medical conditions, allergies, or sensitivities before your appointment.
Proper aftercare instructions must followed to ensure optimal healing and results.
Minors must be by a legal guardian who can provide valid identification.
Cancellation or rescheduling policies are in effect as outlined at the time of booking.

title: FAQ'S | The Black Dahlia | Littleport
description: Frequently asked questions we get at The Black Dahlia tattoo studio including, booking, Pricing, preperation, aftercare and more.
headings: The Black Dahlia private tattoo studio
​Can you cover up an old tattoo?
​What styles do your artists specialise in?
textBlocks: follow our socials for raffles and discounted designs
How do I book an appointment?​
Book using our online booking form or DM us on social media.
Walk-ins are not accepted unless specifically advertised or if you've messaged and we've corresponded to arrange a short-notice appointment.
Yes. A non-refundable deposit is required to secure appointments and is applied toward your final price.
How far in advance should I book?
For large custom work, book 3 – 8 weeks ahead; for smaller pieces, 1–2 weeks is usually sufficient.
Yes. Consults can be in-person or virtual. They’re recommended for custom or large pieces.
Can your artists design something from my idea or photo?
Yes. We create custom designs and can adapt reference photos—artists will work with you to finalize aconcept.
How many revisions are included?
Minor adjustments are included. Major redesigns may require an additional fee or another consult.
Price depends on size, detail, placement, and time required. Complex pieces are quoted after a consultation.
What payment methods do you accept?
Payments are accepted directly to the artist you booked with via their Monzo account; or cash. Unfortunately card is not accepted.
​Yes. A non-refundable deposit is required to secure appointments and is applied toward your final price.
How should I prepare for my appointment?

Get a good night’s sleep, eat a meal before hand, stay hydrated, avoid alcohol and blood-thinning medications (unless prescribed), and wear comfortable clothing that gives access to the area being tattooed.
ID for age verification, drinks and snacks to keep your sugar levels up. If you prefer a specific aftercare product, bring it; otherwise, your artist will recommend products.
You must be at least 18 with valid government ID to receive a tattoo.
How do you ensure safety and hygiene?
We follow strict sterilisation protocols: single-use needles and gloves, hospital-grade disinfectants, and regulated waste disposal. All artists are licensed and follow local health regulations.
Pain varies by placement and personal tolerance. Our artists use techniques to minimise discomfort and can recommend topical numbing cream where appropriate.
What is the healing process like?
Initial healing takes 2 weeks; full healing can take 4–8 weeks depending on size and placement.
What aftercare do you recommend?

Keep the area clean, follow the specific aftercare routine your artist gives, avoid soaking (baths, pools) until healed, and protect tattoos from direct sunlight. Your Artist will provide you with an aftercare sheet.
Yes. Cover-ups depend on size, colour, darkness and placement—book a consultation so the artist can assess your cover-up feasibility.
We offer a complimentary touch-up window (ask for current policy), and additional touch-ups are available for a fee after that period.
We do not provide tattoo removal services, but we can refer you to reputable removal clinics.
Our artists work across styles including traditional, neo-traditional, realism, blackwork, fine line, illustrative, and Japanese—check each artist’s portfolio and social media to match style.
Yes. You can request a specific artist when booking; if unavailable, we’ll suggest another artist with a similar style.
What is your cancellation policy?
Cancellations should be made within the time frame stated in your booking confirmation to avoid forfeiting the deposit. Repeated no-shows or late cancellations may affect future bookings.
Deposits are non-refundable. Tattoo services are final; any concerns should be discussed with your artist for possible remedies like touch-ups.
Yes — available online via our social media DMs or message our site.
Only service animals with documentation are permitted.
One guest is allowed for support, but please keep group size small to maintain a calm studio environment.
